title: Request for planning permission for an Entertainment Resort Complex and associated development in Bedford: part 1 - Introductory documents
body: "1.1.0 Cover letter             Cover letter    PDF, 513 KB, 6 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email alternativeformats@communities.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      1.2.0 Ownership certificates             Ownership certificates    PDF, 855 KB, 10 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.
